event: Winter road scene in the French countryside
description: An impressionist winter landscape showing a snow-covered road leading past houses in a French village. A solitary dark figure walks on the road. Bare trees with delicate branches rise against a grey, overcast sky with hints of blue. Houses with snow-covered roofs line the road. The palette is predominantly white, grey, and pale blue with touches of warm brown and muted pink in the buildings and trees. The brushwork is loose and atmospheric, capturing the cold, diffused light of a winter day.

_meta.title: The Road from Versalles to Saint Germain at Louveciennes
